brief_title: Longitudinal Clinical Evaluation of the HPV Assay on the BD VIPER LT System With Cervical Specimens
official_title: Longitudinal Clinical Evaluation of the HPV Assay on the BD VIPER LT System With Cervical Specimens
brief_summary: The purpose of the study is to assess the cumulative disease detection of greater than or equal to Cervical intraepithelial neoplasia 2 (CIN2) and greater than or equal to Cervical intraepithelial neoplasia 3 (CIN3) in the subjects over 3 years using the subject's HPV status and cytology status from the BDS-USHPV baseline results

interventions.name: BD HPV Assay on Viper LT
interventions.description: The BD HPV specimen will be tested with the BD HPV Assay on the Viper LT instrument.

interventions.name: Colposcopy
interventions.description: The colposcopy will be performed on subjects that have abnormal cytology. At the third year visit all subjects will have an exit colposcopy.

eligibility.criteria:
Inclusion Criteria:

* Subject enrolled into the protocol BDS-USHPV and identified as eligible for the longitudinal protocol • Subjects enrolled into protocol BDS-USHPV with a baseline colposcopy and biopsy procedure and not treated.

Exclusion Criteria:

* Subjects with prior complete or partial hysterectomy involving removal of the cervix
* Subjects on whom conization, LEEP, cervical laser surgery, or cryosurgery has been performed since enrollment into the BDS-USHPV study
* Year 3 visit can not exceed 3 years and 6 months from the baseline visit

locations.facility: Meridian Health / Jersey Shore University Medical Center
Center for Women's Health of Lansdale

primary_outcomes.measure: Cumulative risk of Cervical Intraepithelial Neoplasia 2 and 3 (CIN2 and CIN3) over three years in Human Papillomavirus (HPV) Positive Patients.
primary_outcomes.description: Cumulative risk is a measure of the total risk that a certain event will happen during a given period of time. In this longitudinal study, it refers to the risk of developing \>=CIN2 or \>=CIN3 in subjects over a three year period using the subjects' HPV status at baseline versus cytology status at baseline.

primary_outcomes.measure: Absolute Risk of Cervical Intraepithelial Neoplasia 2 and 3 (CIN2 and CIN3) over 3 years in Human Papillovirus (HPV) Positive Patients.
primary_outcomes.description: Absolute risk will be calculated as: (number of disease cases)/(number of patients at risk).

primary_outcomes.measure: To evaluate different screening strategies using Human Papillovirus (HPV) results with 16/18/45 genotyping and cytology.
primary_outcomes.description: The sensitivity and specificity of HPV primary screening algorithms for identifying ≥ CIN2 and ≥ CIN3 using genotyping and cytology will be calculated.
